# Tables

This section is driven by `catalog/tables.csv`. Final assessment tables can be
added as CSV files under `tables/`, `Tables/`, or generated table folders using
the names listed in the catalog.

```{r table-catalog, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
table_catalog <- read_catalog("tables")
table_roots <- report_paths("table_roots", c("tables/generated", "tables", "Tables"))
emit_catalog_tables(table_catalog, roots = table_roots)
```
